allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({engines: pkg.engines, scripts: pkg.scripts, dependencies: pkg.dependencies, devDependencies: pkg.devDependencies}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/better-sqlite3/package.json'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 version:', pkg.version\); console.log\('engines:', JSON.stringify\(pkg.engines\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const bsq = lock.packages['node_modules/better-sqlite3']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(bsq, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const prebuild = lock.packages['node_modules/prebuild-install']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(prebuild, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('JSON committed valido'\);}\);")
Bash(node -e "import\('./db/client.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('OK', typeof m.sql\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('./db/client.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('OK', typeof m.sql, typeof m.getSql\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./backend/server.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('OK', typeof m.server, typeof m.buildAssistantReply\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); console.error\(e.stack\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('@neondatabase/serverless'\).then\(m => { const sql = m.neon\('postgres://fake@host/db'\); console.log\('query method:', typeof sql.query\); console.log\('keys:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(sql\).slice\(0,20\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./db/migrate.js'\).then\(async \(m\) => { const fs = await import\('node:fs/promises'\); const c = await fs.readFile\('./db/migrations/001-initial.sql','utf8'\); const stmts = m.splitSqlStatements\(c\); console.log\('count:', stmts.length\); stmts.forEach\(\(s,i\) => console.log\('===',i,'===\\n',s.slice\(0,80\).replace\(/\\n/g, ' '\)\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./db/migrate.js'\).then\(async \(m\) => { const fs = await import\('node:fs/promises'\); const c = await fs.readFile\('./db/migrations/001-initial.sql','utf8'\); const stmts = m.splitSqlStatements\(c\); console.log\('=== STMT 0 ===\\n' + stmts[0]\); console.log\('=== STMT 2 ===\\n' + stmts[2]\); }\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./api/assistant.controller.js'\).then\(m => { const r = m.buildAssistantReply\('Come va?', {settings:{currency:'EUR',locale:'it-IT'}, transactions:[{type:'income',amount:1000,source:'monthly',category:'stipendio',date:new Date\(\).toISOString\(\).split\('T'\)[0]},{type:'expense',amount:100,source:'monthly',category:'cibo',date:new Date\(\).toISOString\(\).split\('T'\)[0]}], recurringEntries:[{type:'income',amount:1000,active:true}], recurringExpenses:[{amount:100,active:true}]}\); console.log\(r.includes\('Analisi AI backend'\) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL: missing header'\); console.log\(r.split\('\\\\n'\).slice\(0,3\).join\('\\\\n'\)\); }\)")
